idea_text: Client onboarding checklist monitor for small design agencies

report.idea_text: Client onboarding checklist monitor for small design agencies
report.executive_summary: Small design agencies show onboarding pain, paid-intent exists through tool budgets, and competitor complaints reveal a concrete gap around client-side task completion.

market_analysis.pain_description: Design agencies lose project momentum when clients miss onboarding assets, approvals, and intake tasks.

evidence.title: Clients keep missing onboarding steps
evidence.summary: Direct pain: agency operators manually chase clients for onboarding assets and approvals.
evidence.quote: Every new client needs three reminders before we get the logo files and account access.

evidence.title: Onboarding checklists get ignored
evidence.summary: Direct pain: agencies say onboarding checklists fail because client-side accountability is weak.

wtp_evidence.title: Agency pays for client onboarding tools
wtp_evidence.summary: WTP evidence: agency owner already pays $79/mo for project management and would pay for client-side onboarding completion tracking.
wtp_evidence.quote: We already pay for PM tools; I would pay if it reduced onboarding chasing.

competitor_complaints.title: Project management tools lack client completion pressure
competitor_complaints.summary: Competitor gap: PM tools track internal tasks but miss client-side onboarding accountability.
competitor_complaints.quote: The tool tells our team what to do, but clients still ignore the checklist.

competitor_complaints.title: Client portals are heavy for simple onboarding
competitor_complaints.summary: Competitor complaint: client portals are too heavy when agencies only need lightweight onboarding progress and reminders.

competitor_complaints.title: Alternatives do not show what blocks the launch
competitor_complaints.summary: Competitor complaint: alternatives lack a launch-blocker view that shows exactly which client item is delaying kickoff.

direct_competitors.name: Asana
direct_competitors.gap: Internal PM is strong, but client-side onboarding accountability is weak.

direct_competitors.name: ClientPortalPro
direct_competitors.gap: Too heavy for small design agency onboarding.

report.ideal_customer_profile: Design agencies with 3-20 employees that onboard 3-10 new clients per month and suffer launch delays from missing client assets.
report.pricing_strategy: Test $49-$129/mo based on current agency PM spend and direct WTP from gap_wtp_001.
report.positioning: Client onboarding completion monitor for small design agencies that need to see and unblock client-side launch delays.
report.distribution_strategy: Start in agency owner communities and client onboarding complaint threads.
